codeReview.summary: The partner-list-page feature has been implemented comprehensively. The implementation includes a complete partner list at /partners with all required columns (Nama, Email, Telepon, Tipe Mitra), server-side pagination for large datasets, Indonesian language compliance, responsive design with both table and card views, loading states, and authentication protection. The code follows TypeScript best practices with proper type definitions and uses the established project patterns for server functions with TanStack Start.

issues.description: Uses window.location.href for navigation instead of TanStack Router's router.navigate. While this works, it causes a full page reload instead of client-side navigation. Consider using the router instance from useRouter hook for better UX.
Uses inline CSS-in-JS styles instead of Tailwind CSS classes which are used elsewhere in the project. This creates inconsistency in styling approach but doesn't affect functionality.
Mobile card view shows only name and partner type, missing email and phone columns. This is acceptable for mobile UX but could be enhanced to show more details.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md specifies TanStack Router navigation conventions but doesn't explicitly require router.navigate over window.location.href. Consider documenting navigation patterns more explicitly.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Source code shows window.location.href being used for navigation to /partners/new

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation successfully handles responsive design with both desktop table view and mobile card view using CSS media queries. This pattern could be documented for other data tables.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: CSS media queries in partners.tsx switch between table view and card view at 640px breakpoint

sharedStateObservations.observation: The getPartners server function correctly implements pagination with Prisma skip/take pattern, which is a good reference for other list endpoints.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: app/server/partners.ts shows proper pagination implementation with count and findMany
